title: Lithuanian Treebank ALKSNIS v3.0 syntactic contexts

publication.scope: Source-scoped dependency-relation totals, genre totals, an index of every non-punctuation source lemma, and bounded sentence contexts derived from the reviewed ALKSNIS v3.0 CoNLL-U documents.
publication.access: A compact manifest loads first. Relation and genre totals are separate small views; lemma and context chunks are requested only for the selected source-lemma prefix.

provenance.citation: Rimkutė, E., Bielinskienė, A., Kovalevskaitė, J., Boizou, L., Aleksandravičiūtė, G., Brokaitė, K., and Utka, A. 2019. Lithuanian Treebank ALKSNIS. Vytautas Magnus University. CLARIN-LT Repository. https://hdl.handle.net/20.500.11821/21.

constraints: Treat ALKSNIS as a finite annotated treebank, not as a generic frequency corpus or a thesaurus.
Keep source relation labels, dependency direction, source document, genre, and sentence identifier with every displayed context.
Exclude UPOS=PUNCT from the lemma index, relation summary, and context examples; do not infer a missing linguistic relation.
Keep roots explicit as HEAD=0 / ROOT rather than inventing a lexical head.
Do not claim statistically significant genre differences or generic similarity from this source-scoped sample.
Show at most the documented source-order context limit per lemma and disclose omitted rows.

exclusions: UPOS=PUNCT is excluded from the lemma index, relation summary, and contexts.

exampleSelection.order: Archive member, sentence, and token source order.

views.title: ALKSNIS dependency relations
views.description: Frequency of source dependency-relation labels across non-punctuation token rows, including source roots.

views.title: ALKSNIS source genres
views.description: Document, sentence, token, and non-punctuation relation totals for each source genre.

views.title: ALKSNIS lemma context index
views.description: Every non-punctuation source lemma, with its annotated token count and the number of retained dependency roles.

views.title: ALKSNIS sentence contexts
views.description: Up to the reviewed source-order limit of dependency contexts per non-punctuation lemma; fetch by selected lemma prefix.
